creator: rodrigo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Ginga,

I plan to commit your patch in the next days, but I noticed your port
is not ready for staging. This change is mandatory and should be done.

All the information are available on the porter handbook [1].

If you want, you can submit the changes as a followup for this PR or
as a new one.

- rodrigo

[1]
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/special.html#staging
